mapper.insert: insert into repair(student_id, admin_id, description, status, repair_time) values (#{studentId}, #{adminId}, #{description}, #{status}, #{date})
mapper.select: select id, student_id, admin_id, description, status, repair_time from repair
mapper.update: update repair set student_id = #{studentId}, admin_id = #{adminId}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, repair_time = #{date} where id = #{id}
